reviews.review_description:
The gameplay and the graphics remind of oldschool RPGs. 
The game itself is real cute and feels pretty fleshed-out for what it wants to be. 
I also like that it really feels like you’re going on a journey.
The fighting and stuff is certainly not up to par with the genres greats but it is actually a lot of fun if you really engage in it. 

Cute little game for a really small price.

Good Job!

Still early access so it might get better,
but so far among the worst of the rpg I tried in VR. If you like the genre try something else, like Ilysia.

developer_response.body: Thanks for leaving a review. Is there anything specific you'd like to see improved? I might be able to address it.
